WHEN TURNING THE STEERING WHEEL LEFT OR RIGHT AT LOW SPEED OR STOPPED, GROANING OR RUBBING NOISE IS EMITTED FROM FRONT TIRES. CAR IS 1 MONTH OLD, HAS APPROX. 5000 MILES ON IT NOW AND PROBLEM STILL CONTINUES AFTER 2 ATTEMPTS FOR DEALER TO REPAIR IT.    DURING FILL UPS, THE GAS PUM

narrative.headline: What 2014 Chevrolet Equinox owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints dominate owner reports for this model year, with owners describing oil leaks discovered during ordinary driving and parking situations, in some cases escalating to fires or crashes. Visibility and wiper complaints form the next largest cluster, with owners reporting intermittent instrument cluster warning behavior while driving in reverse. Electrical system and powertrain complaints round out the picture, with owners describing unexplained warning chimes and sudden, complete loss of drive power.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report discovering oil leaks during routine maneuvers such as reversing from a garage, with some incidents involving fires or crashes. · 1 fire · 1 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
issues.blurb: Owners report the instrument cluster information center illuminating intermittently while driving in reverse, with some incidents involving crashes. · 2 crash

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report a warning chime sounding repeatedly while driving with no corresponding warning light visible on the dashboard and no explanation found in the owner's manual. · 2 fire

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle suddenly losing all power and rolling backward while the transmission is in drive, with the failure occurring on multiple occasions.
